- [FS-01] Frontend source tree: src/ contains main.tsx (entry), App.tsx (root layout), store/ (Zustand), hooks/ (React hooks), components/ (UI, co-located CSS), lib/ (pure logic, utilities, tap pipeline), types/ (TypeScript mirrors of Rust types)
